next_atomic_task: Ask the maintainer to approve or reject the exact corrective tag action.

known_blockers: Release tag target and corrected release commit differ.
scope_guard: Do not move, delete, or recreate a tag without exact maintainer approval.

expected_evidence: maintainer approval required before changing tag state
stop_conditions: corrected commit has not passed validation
package version is already published from the old tag
